verdicts.reasoning: The four-level brick-and-blackstone tower has complete walls, lighting, trim, and a patterned roof, but it does not read as a pirate ship.
verdicts.comment: Your brick tower has a strong layered structure and careful trim. Try adding a wooden hull to connect it to the pirate task next.

verdicts.reasoning: The gold center, lantern pattern, and blackstone roof are elaborate and purposeful, while ship features are absent.
verdicts.comment: Your gold and lantern details give the tower a bold focal point. Add a sail shape to steer the idea toward a pirate ship next.

verdicts.reasoning: The tall tower shows sustained work across four decorated levels, but its silhouette and materials miss the pirate-ship task.
verdicts.comment: Your brick pattern creates a detailed and sturdy tower shape. Try extending one side into a recognizable ship hull next.
